mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE IS_DONOR = 'Y' AND WITHDRAW_YN = 'N') AS totalDonorCnt, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS totalDonationAmt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DEV_REQUEST WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING' AND DEL_YN = 'N') AS waitTicketCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE DATE(VISIT_DT) = CURDATE()) AS todayVisitor, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VISIT_LOG) AS totalVisitor FROM DUAL
SELECT TITLE, VIEW_CNT, BRD_TYPE FROM TB_BOARD WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

choose.when: SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(VISIT_DT, '%m-%d') AS CHAR) as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY label ORDER BY label
SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(VISIT_DT, '%Y-%m') AS CHAR) as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY label ORDER BY label
choose.otherwise: SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(VISIT_DT, '%u주차') AS CHAR) as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 WEEK) GROUP BY label ORDER BY label
